_fixture_notes: Case 17: Non-standard ingredient IDs. Convention is 4-char zero-padded ('0001', '0002') but the validator only requires uniqueness within the recipe. IDs in this fixture: '1' (no padding), 'a' (alphabetic), 'ING-001' (with separator), '00001' (over-padding), 'item_3' (underscore + alphanumeric). All unique. No placeholders used in step content — placeholder-format edges are tested separately in placeholder-parsing-edges.json. Tests whether the validator enforces the convention or only the uniqueness rule.
name: Non-Standard IDs Probe
description: Ingredient IDs deliberately deviate from the 4-char zero-padded convention. No step placeholders.

steps.title: Crisp the bread
steps.content: Heat the oil with the garlic and chilli flakes in a pan, then add the bread and toss to coat. Cook for 5-6 minutes until golden. Season with the salt.
